zh.lifeSummary: 當PAYN de ROET , Sir於1275年出生在比利時海瑙特吉聶斯時，他的父親Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx38歲，母親Agnes de Trazegnies36歲。他於1298年12月12日與MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年在比利時海瑙特享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当PAYN de ROET , Sir于1275年出生在比利时海瑙特吉聶斯时，他的父亲Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx38岁，母亲Agnes de Trazegnies36岁。他于1298年12月12日与MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1322年在比利时海瑙特享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: ROET
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an altered form of German Rönn, itself a variant of Rönne (see Ronne ).

variants.name: Roe
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English ro(o) ‘roe deer’ (Old English rā). This is the midland and southern form, also found in South Yorkshire and Lancashire. In much of northern England, however, rā remained unrounded and survives as Ray 3.
English: post-medieval variant of Wroe (see Wray ). Wroe may also have been used as a spelling of Roe .
English: post-medieval variant of   Row   (or vice versa); see   Rowe  .

nameMeanings.name: PAYN
meanings: An old name derived from Latin paganus, a countryman, a peasant.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When PAYN de ROET , Sir was born in 1275, in Guignies, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx, was 38 and his mother, Agnes de Trazegnies, was 36. He married MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT on 12 December 1298, in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1322, in Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque PAYN de ROET , Sir est né en 1275, à Guignies, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Trazegnies, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT le 12 décembre 1298, à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1322, à Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als PAYN de ROET , Sir 1275 in Guignies, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx 38 und seine Mutter Agnes de Trazegnies 36. Er hat am 12. Dezember 1298 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1322 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Hennegau, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando PAYN de ROET , Sir è nato il nel 1275 nel Guignies, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Trazegnies, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT il 12 dicembre 1298, nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1322, nel Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: PAYN de ROET , Sirが1275年にベルギーヘイナトグイグニーズで生まれた時，父Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulxは38歳，母Agnes de Trazegniesは36歳であった。1298年12月12日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントでMARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULTと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年にベルギーヘイナトで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: PAYN de ROET , Sir(이)가 1275년 벨기에 하인오트 길그니스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Trazegnies(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1298년 12월 12일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 벨기에 하인오트에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando PAYN de ROET , Sir nasceu em 1275, em Guignies, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Trazegnies, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT em 12 de dezembro de 1298, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1322, em Hainaut, Bélgica, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда PAYN de ROET , Sir родился в 1275 г. в местности гуигниесь, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Trazegnies, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT 12 декабря 1298 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1322 г. в местности ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando PAYN de ROET , Sir nació en 1275, en Guignies, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Gilles I Ier Rigaud de Roeulx, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agnes de Trazegnies, tenía 36 años. Se casó con MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT el 12 de diciembre de 1298, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1322, en Hainaut, Bélgica, a la edad de 47 años.
